notes: This file is owned by Agent 01 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.
Preferred workflow: add/update only the current sprint+round; do not rewrite past rounds.

sprint_meta.master_plan_section: Stage 5: Cleanup, Consolidation, and Definition of Done (L896+)
sprint_meta.notes: WK40 kickoff: post-WK39 Stage 5. Parallel Wave1 = Agent 12 (root/tools archive) + Agent 01 (02-project-layout.mdc); Wave2 = Agent 11 full gates; Wave3 = Jaimie manual + optional Agent 13 CHANGELOG if Jaimie approves version.
pm_jaimie_send_order: WAVE 1 (run in parallel — start both at once): Agent 12 (LOW intelligence) + Agent 01 (LOW intelligence). 12 owns root script archive/delete; 01 owns .cursor/rules/02-project-layout.mdc. No file overlap; merge to main branch or coordinate if both touch same files (they should not).
WAVE 2 (after Wave 1 both report done, or PRs merged): Agent 11 (LOW intelligence) — run determinism, pytest, qa_smoke, validate_assets; review Global DoD (master plan L925–939); log evidence.

WAVE 3 (human, after Agent 11 PASS): Jaimie — manual smokes: python main.py --no-llm (10m, default Ursina); python main.py --renderer pygame --no-llm (10m, 2D); python main.py --provider mock (5m) from repo root in PowerShell.
WAVE 3b (optional): Agent 13 (LOW) — CHANGELOG / patch-note draft only if Jaimie approves a version bump. No version number without Jaimie.

pm_tech_debt.title: Decouple BuildingPanel from raw GameEngine reference (building_panel.engine + economic_panel getattr)
pm_tech_debt.closed_note: 2026-04-28: BuildingPanel takes on_request_ursina_hud_upload=; GameEngine._request_ursina_hud_upload; economic_panel uses panel.on_request_ursina_hud_upload
pm_tech_debt.rationale: Assessor: game/engine.py sets self.building_panel.engine = self. game/ui/building_renderers/economic_panel._request_live_hud_upload_for_ursina uses getattr(panel, 'engine', None) to set _ursina_hud_force_upload. Replace with explicit callback or small interface on BuildingPanel, not a full engine reference.

You are being activated for sprint wk40-refactor-stage5-cleanup (Architecture Refactor Stage 5: Cleanup, consolidation, Definition of Done), round wk40_r0_kickoff.

1) Read the sprint plan FIRST: .cursor/plans/wk40_stage_5_sprint_404c01dc.plan.md (short index: .cursor/plans/wk40_stage5_cleanup_dod.plan.md).
2) Read the master plan Stage 5: .cursor/plans/master_plan_architecture_refactor.md (approx. L896+, Task 5-A through Global DoD).

4) Follow Jaimie's send order in that sprint block (sprint_meta.pm_jaimie_send_order). Wave 1: Agents 12 and 01 in parallel. Wave 2: Agent 11. Wave 3: Jaimie manual. Wave 3b optional: Agent 13.
5) When done: update your own agent log JSON; run the gates in your numbered prompt; report to Jaimie: files, commands, exit codes, blockers.

One line: root script cleanup + 02-project-layout update + final gates and manual smokes; no new gameplay or renderer refactors in this sprint unless a gate requires a hotfix (escalate to PM / Agent 03).

sprint_meta.notes: Readability-only: split ursina_renderer.py + GameEngine into modules/collaborators. No behavior change. Owner 03; QA 11; optional perf 10 parallel with 11 after each 03 round.

Start Step 2 only after Step 1 is merged or 03 confirms R1 complete on your branch.
STEP 3 — Agent 03 (HIGH): WK41-R2 Track A2 — UrsinaRenderer method groups / collaborators (terrain+fog vs entities per plan); gates + log.
STEP 4 — PARALLEL: Agent 11 + Agent 10 (same as Step 2).
STEP 5 — Agent 03 (HIGH): WK41-R3 Track B — GameEngine facades (e.g. camera/display + render coordinator) with delegation one-liners; do not break GameCommands or public GameEngine API; gates + log.

STEP 8 — PARALLEL: Agent 11 + Agent 10; then JAIMIE manual (~10 min each): python main.py --renderer ursina --no-llm ; python main.py --renderer pygame --no-llm. Optional: python main.py --renderer ursina --provider mock. STEP 8b optional — Agent 13 (LOW): CHANGELOG draft only if Jaimie wants; no version bump without Jaimie.

sprint_meta.notes: WK42: finish WK41. Delete the 819-line duplicate module-level block in ursina_renderer.py (Track A); wire UrsinaTerrainFogCollab as live terrain/fog path and delete 6 duplicated methods (Track B); wire UrsinaEntityRenderCollab and delete 11 duplicated entity-render methods (Track C). sprint_meta.pm_audit_finding: 2026-04-27 audit confirmed: ursina_environment.py, ursina_prefabs.py, ursina_coords.py, ursina_units_anim.py each contain functions that are ALSO defined in ursina_renderer.py — 35 functions total, 100% duplication, renderer imports none of the new modules. sprint_meta.notes: Stage 3: BuilderPeasant gathers local wood by chopping trees (5s) then harvesting log pile (5s) until they have enough wood for their assigned plot (house/food_stand=10, farm=20). Chopping allowed only on tiles with Visibility != UNSEEN (SEEN or VISIBLE). Tree yields by growth: >=1.0 -> 10, >=0.75 -> 7, >=0.50 -> 5; cannot chop below 0.50. Logs are visual-only: render `log_stackLarge` model at the chopped tile with scale matching tree growth; disappear after harvest.

pm_status_summary.focus: Implement Stage 3 lumberjack builders per plan; ensure deterministic tree targeting; fog rule: may chop SEEN or VISIBLE tiles, never UNSEEN. Ensure runtime model paths do not point into raw Kenney download folders.

pm_feature_requests.title: Builder peasants chop trees for local wood before building
acceptance: When a neutral plot spawns, BuilderPeasant gathers wood locally and only then builds.
Chopping only allowed on SEEN or VISIBLE tiles; UNSEEN trees are ignored.
Yields/costs match spec: 10/10/20 cost; yields 10/7/5 by growth; no chopping < 0.5.
Log stack appears during harvest window and is scaled by growth; disappears when harvested.
Gates PASS: qa_smoke --quick; validate_assets --report; and pytest baseline.

Do not rename the stem (must be `log_stackLarge` so `_environment_model_path('log_stackLarge')` can resolve it).
Confirm `python tools/validate_assets.py --report` still exits 0 (errors=0).
If attribution needs an update, add the minimal entry (but prefer not to change licensing text unless the repo requires it).
acceptance_criteria: Asset gate still passes: validate_assets exit 0.

asks: Implement BuilderPeasant Stage 3 wood-gathering state machine per the sprint plan.
Wood is per-builder only: track `wood_inventory` on the BuilderPeasant; do not add player/global wood.
Tree yields by growth: >=1.0 => 10, >=0.75 => 7, >=0.50 => 5; cannot chop below 0.50.
Durations: 5s chop + 5s harvest per tree.
If no eligible trees (SEEN/VISIBLE only), builder should go stand on assigned plot (no crash / no infinite loop).
Add focused unit tests for yield/cost gating (farm requires 2 full trees or equivalent).
Do NOT edit engine/renderer files owned by Agent 03.
acceptance_criteria: Builder does not build until wood >= required_wood for that building type.
Farm requires 20 wood (multiple chops if needed).

asks: Add SimEngine helpers for Stage 3 so BuilderPeasant can find/chop/harvest trees deterministically and safely.
Fog rule: eligible tree tiles must have `world.visibility[ty][tx] != Visibility.UNSEEN` (SEEN or VISIBLE).
Chop must remove the Tree entity, clear world TileType.TREE to GRASS, and update `_tree_growth_by_tile` immediately.
Add a render-facing `log_stacks` list to SimEngine + snapshot so Ursina can render log piles keyed by tile; destroy them on harvest.
Ursina: render `log_stackLarge` at the chopped tile with scale matching growth (0.5/0.75/1.0). Use runtime path under `assets/models/environment/` (do not reference raw Kenney folders).
Add minimal HUD support so selecting a peasant can show wood inventory if present (optional but recommended).
Run full gates after integration.
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot includes log stacks and Ursina renders them when present.
Building placement + sapling removal rules remain correct (no invisible blockers).

asks: Visual sanity check only: confirm log stack scale reads well at 0.5 / 0.75 / 1.0 and does not Z-fight terrain.

pm_agent_prompts.15: WK46 Stage 3 (Model/Assets, MEDIUM): Read the sprint plan: .cursor/plans/wk46_stage3-lumberjack-builders_fec1c955.plan.md. Task: copy `assets/models/Models/Kenny raw downloads (for exact paths)/kenney_nature-kit/Models/GLTF format/log_stackLarge.glb` into `assets/models/environment/log_stackLarge.glb` so Ursina can load it via `_environment_model_path('log_stackLarge')`. Do not reference raw download paths at runtime. Run: python tools/validate_assets.py --report. Report back with files touched + command + exit code.
pm_agent_prompts.05: WK46 Stage 3 (Gameplay, HIGH): Read the sprint plan: .cursor/plans/wk46_stage3-lumberjack-builders_fec1c955.plan.md. Implement BuilderPeasant lumberjack behavior: per-peasant wood inventory; chop 5s + harvest 5s; yields 10/7/5 for growth >=1.0/0.75/0.50; costs house=10, food_stand=10, farm=20; cannot chop <0.50. Fog rule: trees in UNSEEN fog cannot be chopped (SEEN/VISIBLE allowed). If no eligible trees, builder stands on assigned plot. Add focused tests proving builder does not build until wood threshold met. Do NOT edit engine/renderer files. Run: python tools/determinism_guard.py; python -m pytest tests/ (at minimum include your new tests). Report files touched + exit codes.
pm_agent_prompts.03: WK46 Stage 3 (Tech, HIGH): Read the sprint plan: .cursor/plans/wk46_stage3-lumberjack-builders_fec1c955.plan.md. Integrate Stage 3 into SimEngine + snapshot + Ursina: add sim helpers to find/chop/harvest trees deterministically, respecting fog rule (visibility != UNSEEN). Maintain world TileType + tree_growth_lookup consistency when chopping. Add sim `log_stacks` list and include it in SimStateSnapshot so Ursina can render `log_stackLarge` (runtime path `assets/models/environment/log_stackLarge.glb`) scaled by growth (0.5/0.75/1.0). Destroy log entities when harvested. Run full gates: python -m pytest tests/; python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick; python tools/validate_assets.py --report. Report files touched + exit codes.
pm_agent_prompts.11: WK46 Stage 3 (QA, LOW): After 03/05/15 say Stage 3 is integrated, run: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick; python tools/validate_assets.py --report. Log exit codes and any failures in agent_11 log.
pm_agent_prompts.09: WK46 Stage 3 (Art consult, LOW): Optional visual check: run `python main.py --renderer ursina --no-llm` and watch a builder chop a tree. Confirm log stack scale looks correct at 0.5/0.75/1.0 and doesn't clip terrain; if off, recommend a small scale multiplier constant tweak. No code changes unless asked.

wk46_r0_kickoff.pm_universal_prompt:
You are being activated for sprint **wk46-stage3-lumberjack-builders**, round **wk46_r0_kickoff**.

1) Read the sprint plan FIRST: `.cursor/plans/wk46_stage3-lumberjack-builders_fec1c955.plan.md`
2) Read the master plan context (Stage 3): `.cursor/plans/master_plan_building_nature_sprints.md`
3) Read the PM hub for your assignment:
   `.cursor/plans/agent_logs/agent_01_ExecutiveProducer_PM.json`
   → `sprints["wk46-stage3-lumberjack-builders"].rounds["wk46_r0_kickoff"].pm_agent_prompts["YOUR_AGENT_NUMBER"]`
4) Stay in scope: Stage 3 lumberjack builders only (no global player wood).
5) Determinism + fog rule: may chop only tiles with `Visibility != UNSEEN` (SEEN/VISIBLE).
6) Update your agent log with: files touched, commands run, exit codes, and any blockers.

One line: **Builders chop (5s) + harvest (5s) trees for local wood before building; logs are visual-only and scaled by tree growth.**

round_meta.notes: Playtest: no FoodStands/Farms ever built; Houses partially built then builder dies -> plot never completes. Root cause likely: NeutralBuildingSystem returns early whenever ANY requires_builder_peasant plot exists, but does not spawn a replacement builder for that plot if the original builder dies; this blocks all further plot spawning including food/farm.

pm_bug_tickets.title: Food stands and farms never build (blocked by builder-only plot gate)
repro_steps: Play until multiple plots spawn (houses should appear).
Observe that FoodStand and Farm plots are never completed (and may never spawn if houses are stuck).
pm_bug_tickets.expected: After some time, at least one FoodStand and one Farm should be constructed (once hero_count thresholds are met).
pm_bug_tickets.actual: No FoodStands/Farms are built in playtest session; progression appears stuck behind houses.
acceptance_test: Manual: python main.py --renderer ursina --no-llm (5–10 minutes) — observe at least one FoodStand and Farm get constructed in a typical run.

pm_bug_tickets.title: If builder peasant dies mid-construction, plot never completes (no replacement builder)
repro_steps: Wait for a House plot to start construction (partially built).
Allow the BuilderPeasant to die (enemy attack) before completion.
Observe that the plot stays partially built forever; no new builder arrives.
pm_bug_tickets.expected: If a BuilderPeasant dies, another BuilderPeasant should spawn from the castle and resume/finish the partially built plot (no additional wood/resources needed).
pm_bug_tickets.actual: Partially built plot never completes once the builder dies.
acceptance_test: Unit: add/extend a test to simulate builder death and assert a replacement builder spawns and finishes the plot.
Manual: python main.py --renderer ursina --no-llm — kill builder mid-build and observe replacement completes it.

asks: Fix NeutralBuildingSystem gating so builder-only plots do NOT permanently block progression when no BuilderPeasant is alive.

Implement replacement builder spawning: if there exists any plot/building with requires_builder_peasant==True and hp>0 and is_constructed==False, and there is NO active BuilderPeasant, spawn a new BuilderPeasant targeting that plot (prefer the oldest/nearest).
After spawning a replacement builder, return early (do not spawn new plots in the same tick).
Ensure this unblocks FoodStand/Farm spawning once houses are caught up (do not require all houses to be built forever due to a stuck plot).

Stage 3 rule: If a plot is already partially built (construction_started==True or construction_progress>0), the replacement builder should resume BUILDING without requiring additional wood (no double-paying).
Add/extend tests: a test that simulates a partially built plot + dead builder and asserts a new builder is spawned and finishes the building.
Run: python -m pytest tests/ and python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick.
acceptance_criteria: FoodStand/Farm progression resumes in a typical run (not blocked forever by one stuck house plot).
Replacement builder spawns and completes partially built plot after builder death (no extra wood required).

asks: Review the fix for any cross-system issues: BuilderPeasant state machine should be able to resume partial construction without wood and without breaking determinism.
If the solution requires a small SimEngine helper (e.g., selecting the oldest builder-only plot), implement minimally and coordinate with Agent 05.
After Agent 05 reports fix landed, run: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick; python tools/validate_assets.py --report. Log exit codes.

pm_send_list_minimal.rationale: Primary fix lives in NeutralBuildingSystem + BuilderPeasant logic (Agent 05). Agent 03 reviews/integrates only if needed. Agent 11 validates gates after fix.

pm_agent_prompts.05: WK46 R1 BUGFIX (Gameplay, HIGH): Playtest reports: (1) no FoodStands/Farms built, (2) if BuilderPeasant dies mid-build the plot never completes. Read the sprint plan: .cursor/plans/wk46_stage3-lumberjack-builders_fec1c955.plan.md and then open the PM hub: .cursor/plans/agent_logs/agent_01_ExecutiveProducer_PM.json → wk46-stage3-lumberjack-builders → rounds → wk46_r1_bugfix_builder_respawn_and_progress_unblock. Root cause likely in game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: it returns early if ANY requires_builder_peasant plot exists, but does not spawn replacement builders. Implement: if there is any plot with requires_builder_peasant==True and hp>0 and not is_constructed, and there is NO active BuilderPeasant, spawn a new BuilderPeasant targeting that plot (pick deterministic order: e.g., lowest (grid_y,grid_x) or oldest inserted). After spawning, return early. Also: if plot is already partially built (construction_started==True or construction_progress>0), replacement builder must resume building without requiring additional wood (no double-paying). Add/extend a unit test to simulate: spawn plot, advance some work, mark builder dead/removed, tick NeutralBuildingSystem -> asserts new builder spawns and finishes. Run: python -m pytest tests/; python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick. Report files + exit codes.
pm_agent_prompts.03: WK46 R1 BUGFIX (Tech consult, MEDIUM): Review Agent 05’s fix for determinism + any needed SimEngine helper. Only implement minimal integration changes if required. Gates: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick after changes.
pm_agent_prompts.11: WK46 R1 BUGFIX (QA, LOW): After Agent 05 reports done, run: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick; python tools/validate_assets.py --report. Log exit codes and report PASS/failures.

pm_status_summary.summary: WK46 closed. Builder peasants chop + harvest trees for local wood before building; log piles render in 3D; replacement builder spawns if one dies mid-build; neutral plots/builders can run concurrently so food stands/farms build in practice. Gates PASS (Agent 11) and playtesting confirmed behavior.

pm_accepted_deliverables: Stage 3 BuilderPeasant wood-gathering state machine (local wood inventory; yields by growth; costs for house/food stand/farm).
SimEngine helpers + snapshot.log_stacks + Ursina log stack rendering + HUD wood display.
Bugfix: replacement builder spawns for pending plots; partial-build resumes without double-paying; allow limited concurrency and mixed-type progression.
Runtime model: assets/models/environment/log_stackLarge.glb.

pm_evidence.human_playtest: Jaimie: confirmed builders build + farms/food stands can complete; replacement builders spawn when needed (2026-04-29)
